subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabl-i-Ja'far! The Lord of mankind maketh mention of thee from the Most Great Scene and commandeth thee unto that whereby the Cause shall be exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل جعفر یذکرک مولی البشر فی المنظر الاکبر و یامرک بما یرتفع به امر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
